title: urena armitiana var. armitiana
intro: Urena armitiana var. armitiana, commonly known as the Armit's urena, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Urena armitiana var. armitiana include the treatment of wounds, skin infections, and fever, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Urena armitiana var. armitiana can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
